# VANIR GROUP - robots.txt
# https://vanirgroup.com

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /blog
Allow: /blog/
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /ai-dashboard
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /signup
Disallow: /sign-in
Disallow: /sign-up
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /components

# Crawl-delay for polite crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://vanirgroup.com/sitemap.xml

# Google specific
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /api/

# Bing specific
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /api/
